name: Commercial Lending Origination & Covenant Monitoring
nameZh: 商业信贷受理与契约监测

objects.name: Borrower
objects.description: The commercial party that applies for and receives a secured loan facility; mastered in Oracle FLEXCUBE.
objects.descriptionZh: 申请并取得有担保信贷额度的商业主体；以 Oracle FLEXCUBE 为主数据源。

attributes.name: borrower_id
attributes.description: Primary key issued by Oracle FLEXCUBE.

attributes.name: watch_list_flag
attributes.description: Set by Rule R-14 when two or more breaches occur in a rolling 12-month period.

attributes.name: risk_rating_id
attributes.description: FK to the borrower's current RiskRating.

sources.snippet: `Borrower` is mastered in **Oracle FLEXCUBE** (`borrower_id`); nCino references it by `borrower_id` as a foreign key.

objects.name: LoanFacility
objects.description: A secured commercial loan facility (term loan, revolver, or committed line) originated in nCino and booked into Oracle FLEXCUBE.
objects.descriptionZh: 由 nCino 受理并在 Oracle FLEXCUBE 入账的有担保商业信贷额度（定期贷款、循环贷款或承诺额度）。

attributes.name: facility_id
attributes.description: Primary key and cross-system correlation key.

sources.snippet: `LoanFacility` — *system of record: nCino (pipeline) → Oracle FLEXCUBE (booked)*

objects.name: Covenant
objects.description: A financial covenant (DSCR, leverage, LTV, or minimum liquidity) bound to a LoanFacility and tested on a schedule by CovenantWatch.
objects.descriptionZh: 绑定于信贷额度并由 CovenantWatch 按计划测试的财务契约（偿债保障比率、杠杆、贷款价值比或最低流动性）。

sources.snippet: `Covenant` — *system of record: CovenantWatch*

objects.name: Collateral
objects.description: Security pledged against a LoanFacility, appraised for fair value and perfected by Loan Operations and Legal.
objects.descriptionZh: 为信贷额度提供担保的抵押物，经评估确定公允价值并由贷款运营与法务完善担保权益。

sources.snippet: `Collateral` — *system of record: Oracle FLEXCUBE*

objects.name: RepaymentSchedule
objects.description: The amortizing installment schedule generated for a booked LoanFacility in Oracle FLEXCUBE.
objects.descriptionZh: 在 Oracle FLEXCUBE 中为已入账信贷额度生成的分期摊还还款计划。

sources.snippet: `RepaymentSchedule` — *system of record: Oracle FLEXCUBE*

objects.name: RiskRating
objects.description: A 1-10 risk score (10 = highest risk) assigned to a Borrower, scored in Sageworks and assigned in nCino.
objects.descriptionZh: 授予借款人的 1 至 10 级风险评分（10 为最高风险），在 Sageworks 评分、在 nCino 授予。

sources.snippet: `RiskRating` — *system of record: nCino (assigned), Sageworks (scored)*

objects.name: Drawdown
objects.description: A request to draw funds against an Active LoanFacility, cleared by eligibility check and disbursed by Loan Operations.
objects.descriptionZh: 针对生效信贷额度的资金支用请求，经合规检查放行后由贷款运营拨付。

attributes.name: amount
attributes.description: Rule R-06: may not exceed undrawn commitment.

sources.snippet: `Drawdown` — *system of record: Oracle FLEXCUBE*

objects.name: CreditMemo
objects.description: The credit recommendation document carrying proposed terms, covenant definitions, and the approval decision; authored in nCino, stored in iManage.
objects.descriptionZh: 载明建议条款、契约定义与审批决定的信贷推荐文件；在 nCino 撰写并存档于 iManage。

sources.snippet: `CreditMemo` — *system of record: nCino; document in iManage*

objects.name: WaiverRequest
objects.description: A request to waive a financial covenant breach, granted only by the Credit Committee with an expiry no later than the next scheduled test.
objects.descriptionZh: 针对财务契约违约的豁免申请，仅由信贷委员会批准，且到期日不得晚于下一次预定测试。

sources.snippet: `WaiverRequest` — *system of record: nCino; document in iManage*

objects.name: MarginCallNotice
objects.description: A notice issued on an LTV covenant breach demanding cure of the collateral shortfall within a deadline.
objects.descriptionZh: 在贷款价值比契约违约时发出的通知，要求在期限内补足抵押物缺口。

sources.snippet: `MarginCallNotice` — *system of record: Oracle FLEXCUBE; document in iManage*

relationships.name: holds
relationships.description: A borrower may hold one or more loan facilities.

sources.snippet: `borrower_id` | UUID | **FK → `Borrower`**

relationships.name: rated_by
relationships.description: A borrower carries successive versions of a risk rating.

sources.snippet: `risk_rating_id` | UUID | **FK → `RiskRating`**

relationships.name: bound_by
relationships.description: Every facility must have at least one financial covenant (Rule R-03).

sources.snippet: Every `LoanFacility` must have at least one financial `Covenant` defined in its `CreditMemo` before it may be submitted for credit decision.

relationships.name: secured_by

label.zh: 信贷额度由抵押物担保

relationships.description: A facility may be secured by one or more collateral records.

sources.snippet: creates one or more `Collateral` records linked to the `LoanFacility`; computes loan-to-value (LTV).

relationships.name: amortized_by

label.zh: 信贷额度按还款计划摊还

relationships.description: A booked facility generates an amortizing repayment schedule.

sources.snippet: creates the canonical `LoanFacility` in FLEXCUBE; generates the `RepaymentSchedule`.

relationships.name: drawn_via

label.zh: 信贷额度通过支用提取

relationships.description: An active facility may be drawn down one or more times.

sources.snippet: creates `Drawdown` (status `Requested`) against an `Active` `LoanFacility`.

relationships.name: recommended_by

label.zh: 信贷额度由审批备忘录推荐

relationships.description: Each facility is recommended for decision via a credit memo.

sources.snippet: creates `CreditMemo`; creates one or more `Covenant` records ... bound to the `LoanFacility`.

relationships.name: waived_by
relationships.description: A breached covenant may be covered by a granted waiver request.

sources.snippet: unless a `WaiverRequest` with status `Granted` is on file for that `Covenant`.

relationships.name: issued_against

label.zh: 追加保证金通知针对抵押物

relationships.description: A margin call references the under-valued collateral that triggered it.

sources.snippet: creates a `MarginCallNotice` linked to the `LoanFacility` and the under-valued `Collateral`.

rules.title: Credit Officer authority below USD 5M
rules.titleZh: 信贷专员 500 万美元以下审批权限

statement.en: A CreditMemo recommending a new LoanFacility shall be approved by a Credit Officer when the committed amount is at or below USD 5,000,000; above this amount the CreditMemo must be escalated to the Credit Committee.
statement.zh: 当承诺金额不超过 500 万美元时，推荐新信贷额度的信贷审批备忘录应由信贷专员批准；超过此金额则必须上报信贷委员会。

sources.snippet: A `CreditMemo` recommending a new `LoanFacility` shall be approved by a Credit Officer when the committed amount is at or below USD 5,000,000; above this amount the `CreditMemo` must be escalated to the Credit Committee.

rules.title: Weak rating requires Credit Committee approval
rules.titleZh: 弱评级须信贷委员会批准

statement.en: A LoanFacility with a Borrower RiskRating weaker than 6 (on the 1-10 scale where 10 is highest risk) may not be approved by a single Credit Officer and is required to receive Credit Committee approval regardless of amount.
statement.zh: 借款人风险评级弱于 6（1 至 10 级，10 为最高风险）的信贷额度，不得由单一信贷专员批准，无论金额多少均须经信贷委员会批准。

sources.snippet: A `LoanFacility` with a `Borrower` `RiskRating` weaker than 6 (on the 1–10 scale where 10 is highest risk) may not be approved by a single Credit Officer and is required to receive Credit Committee approval regardless of amount.

rules.title: Facility requires at least one covenant
rules.titleZh: 信贷额度须至少含一项契约

statement.en: Every LoanFacility must have at least one financial Covenant defined in its CreditMemo before it may be submitted for credit decision.
statement.zh: 每笔信贷额度在提交信贷决定前，必须在其审批备忘录中定义至少一项财务契约。

sources.snippet: Every `LoanFacility` must have at least one financial `Covenant` defined in its `CreditMemo` before it may be submitted for credit decision.

rules.title: No funding until booked and security perfected
rules.titleZh: 未入账并完善担保前不得放款

statement.en: A LoanFacility may not be funded until both the FacilityBooked event and the SecurityPerfected event have been recorded, confirming all conditions precedent are satisfied.
statement.zh: 信贷额度在 FacilityBooked 与 SecurityPerfected 两个事件均已记录、确认所有先决条件满足之前，不得放款。

sources.snippet: A `LoanFacility` may not be funded until both the `FacilityBooked` event and the `SecurityPerfected` event have been recorded, confirming all conditions precedent are satisfied.

rules.title: No drawdown while covenant in breach without waiver
rules.titleZh: 契约违约且无豁免时不得支用

statement.en: A LoanFacility may not be drawn down while any financial Covenant is in breach, unless a WaiverRequest with status Granted is on file for that Covenant.
statement.zh: 在任何财务契约处于违约状态时，信贷额度不得支用，除非该契约已有状态为 Granted 的豁免申请在案。

rules.formal: drawdown(LoanFacility) → ∀ Covenant: (Covenant.test_result ≠ Breached) ∨ (∃ WaiverRequest: status = Granted)

sources.snippet: A `LoanFacility` may not be drawn down while any financial `Covenant` is in breach, unless a `WaiverRequest` with status `Granted` is on file for that `Covenant`.

rules.title: Drawdown within undrawn commitment
rules.titleZh: 支用不得超过未提取承诺

statement.en: A Drawdown may not exceed the undrawn available commitment of its LoanFacility.
statement.zh: 支用金额不得超过其信贷额度的未提取可用承诺。

sources.snippet: A `Drawdown` may not exceed the undrawn available commitment of its `LoanFacility`.

rules.title: Risk rating refreshed at least every 12 months
rules.titleZh: 风险评级至少每 12 个月刷新

statement.en: A Borrower RiskRating must be refreshed at least every 12 months.
statement.zh: 借款人风险评级必须至少每 12 个月刷新一次。

sources.snippet: A `Borrower` `RiskRating` must be refreshed at least every 12 months.

rules.title: Rating refresh within 30 days of breach
rules.titleZh: 违约后 30 日内刷新评级

statement.en: A Borrower RiskRating is required to be refreshed within 30 days after any covenant breach, and where this 30-day deadline falls before the scheduled annual review it shall take precedence.
statement.zh: 任何契约违约发生后 30 日内必须刷新借款人风险评级；若该 30 日期限早于预定年度复核，则以前者为准。

sources.snippet: A `Borrower` `RiskRating` is required to be refreshed within 30 days after any covenant breach, and where this 30-day deadline falls before the scheduled annual review it shall take precedence.

rules.title: LTV must stay at or below 80%
rules.titleZh: 贷款价值比不得高于 80%

statement.en: A LoanFacility's loan-to-value must stay at or below 80% of the pledged Collateral fair value; a breach triggers a MarginCallNotice.
statement.zh: 信贷额度的贷款价值比必须保持在所质押抵押物公允价值的 80% 及以下；违约将触发追加保证金通知。

sources.snippet: A `LoanFacility`'s loan-to-value must stay at or below 80% of the pledged `Collateral` fair value; a breach triggers a `MarginCallNotice`.

rules.title: Quarterly covenant tested within 45 days of quarter end
rules.titleZh: 季度契约须在季末 45 日内测试

statement.en: A financial Covenant with a quarterly test_frequency must be tested within 45 calendar days of each fiscal quarter end.
statement.zh: 测试频率为季度的财务契约必须在每个财务季度结束后 45 个日历日内完成测试。

sources.snippet: A financial `Covenant` with a quarterly `test_frequency` must be tested within 45 calendar days of each fiscal quarter end.

rules.title: DSCR covenant breached below 1.25x
rules.titleZh: 偿债保障比率低于 1.25 倍即违约

statement.en: A debt-service-coverage Covenant is breached when the tested ratio falls below 1.25x.
statement.zh: 当测得的偿债保障比率低于 1.25 倍时，该偿债保障契约即视为违约。

sources.snippet: A debt-service-coverage `Covenant` is breached when the tested ratio falls below 1.25x.

rules.title: Leverage covenant breached above 3.5x
rules.titleZh: 杠杆比率高于 3.5 倍即违约

statement.en: A leverage Covenant is breached when total funded debt to EBITDA exceeds 3.5x.
statement.zh: 当总有息负债与息税折旧摊销前利润之比超过 3.5 倍时，该杠杆契约即视为违约。

sources.snippet: A leverage `Covenant` is breached when total funded debt to EBITDA exceeds 3.5x.

rules.title: Breach escalated to committee within 2 business days
rules.titleZh: 违约须在 2 个工作日内上报委员会

statement.en: A CovenantBreached event must be escalated to the Credit Committee within 2 business days of detection, with a citation to the breached covenant clause and the relevant Loan Agreement section.
statement.zh: CovenantBreached 事件必须在检测后 2 个工作日内上报信贷委员会，并附上所违约契约条款及相关贷款协议章节的引用。

rules.formal: CovenantBreached(t) → escalateToCommittee within 2 business days ∧ cite(Covenant.clause_reference)

sources.snippet: A `CovenantBreached` event must be escalated to the Credit Committee within 2 business days of detection, with a citation to the breached covenant clause and the relevant `Loan Agreement` section.

rules.title: Two breaches in 12 months places borrower on Watch List
rules.titleZh: 12 个月内两次违约列入观察名单

statement.en: A Borrower with two or more covenant breaches within any rolling 12-month period shall be placed on the Watch List and may not receive new LoanFacility approvals until removed.
statement.zh: 在任意滚动 12 个月期间内发生两次或以上契约违约的借款人应被列入观察名单，并在移除前不得获得新的信贷额度批准。

rules.formal: count(CovenantBreached for Borrower in rolling 12 months) >= 2 → Borrower.watch_list_flag = true ∧ block(new LoanFacility approval)

sources.snippet: A `Borrower` with two or more covenant breaches within any rolling 12-month period shall be placed on the Watch List and may not receive new `LoanFacility` approvals until removed.

rules.title: Waiver granted only by committee with expiry
rules.titleZh: 豁免仅委员会批准且须设到期日

statement.en: A WaiverRequest covering a financial covenant breach may be granted only by the Credit Committee and is required to specify an expiry date no later than the next scheduled covenant test.
statement.zh: 针对财务契约违约的豁免申请仅可由信贷委员会批准，且必须指定不晚于下一次预定契约测试的到期日。

rules.formal: WaiverRequest.status = Granted → approvedBy = CreditCommittee ∧ WaiverRequest.expiry_date <= next_scheduled_test

sources.snippet: A `WaiverRequest` covering a financial covenant breach may be granted only by the Credit Committee and is required to specify an expiry date no later than the next scheduled covenant test.

rules.title: Margin call cured within 10 business days or default
rules.titleZh: 追加保证金须 10 个工作日内补足否则违约

statement.en: A Borrower who receives a MarginCallNotice is required to cure the loan-to-value shortfall within 10 business days, after which the LoanFacility shall be classified as in default.
statement.zh: 收到追加保证金通知的借款人必须在 10 个工作日内补足贷款价值比缺口，逾期后该信贷额度应被归类为违约。

rules.formal: MarginCallNotice issued → cure within 10 business days ∨ LoanFacility.status = Default

sources.snippet: A `Borrower` who receives a `MarginCallNotice` is required to cure the loan-to-value shortfall within 10 business days, after which the `LoanFacility` shall be classified as in default.

rules.title: Re-validate drawdown not funded within 5 business days
rules.titleZh: 5 个工作日内未放款的支用须重新校验

statement.en: A Drawdown request that is not funded within 5 business days of being cleared is required to be re-validated against current Covenant states before disbursement.
statement.zh: 在放行后 5 个工作日内未拨付的支用请求，必须在拨付前根据当前契约状态重新校验。

rules.formal: Drawdown.status = Cleared ∧ now > cleared_date + 5 business days → revalidate(Covenant states) before DisburseFunds

trigger.description: before disbursement of a cleared drawdown

sources.snippet: A `Drawdown` request that is not funded within 5 business days of being cleared is required to be re-validated against current `Covenant` states before disbursement.

rules.title: Rating of 9 or 10 requires Credit Committee review
rules.titleZh: 9 或 10 级评级须信贷委员会复核

statement.en: A RiskRating of 9 or 10 must be reviewed by the Credit Committee and may not be assigned by a Credit Analyst acting alone.
statement.zh: 9 或 10 级风险评级必须经信贷委员会复核，不得由信贷分析师单独授予。

sources.snippet: A `RiskRating` of 9 or 10 must be reviewed by the Credit Committee and may not be assigned by a Credit Analyst acting alone.

rules.title: Collateral re-appraised every 18 months or after margin call
rules.titleZh: 抵押物每 18 个月或追加保证金后重新评估

statement.en: Collateral pledged against a LoanFacility must be re-appraised at least every 18 months, or within 30 days of a MarginCallNotice, whichever is sooner.
statement.zh: 为信贷额度质押的抵押物必须至少每 18 个月重新评估一次，或在追加保证金通知发出后 30 日内重新评估，以较早者为准。

sources.snippet: `Collateral` pledged against a `LoanFacility` must be re-appraised at least every 18 months, or within 30 days of a `MarginCallNotice`, whichever is sooner.

rules.title: No retroactive waiver after a margin call
rules.titleZh: 追加保证金后不得追溯豁免

statement.en: A WaiverRequest may not be granted retroactively for a breach that has already triggered a MarginCallNotice.
statement.zh: 对于已触发追加保证金通知的违约，不得追溯批准豁免申请。

sources.snippet: A `WaiverRequest` may not be granted retroactively for a breach that has already triggered a `MarginCallNotice`.

ruleGroups.rationale: Section A rules governing who may approve a facility and minimum eligibility to submit for decision.
Conditions that must be satisfied before any facility may be funded.
Section B controls limiting when and how much may be drawn down.
Section C rules on the cadence and authority of risk-rating refresh and assignment.
Section D rules constraining LTV, margin calls, and collateral appraisal.
Section E testing cadence and breach thresholds for financial covenants.
Section E breach escalation timing and recurring-breach watch-listing.
Section F rules on who may grant waivers and their limits.

actions.name: CaptureApplication
actions.description: Consumes the borrower's signed application package and produces a new LoanFacility linked to the Borrower.
actions.descriptionZh: 受理借款人已签署的申请材料，生成与借款人关联的新信贷额度记录。

text.en: Capture the borrower's signed application package in nCino.
text.zh: 在 nCino 中录入借款人已签署的申请材料。

text.en: Create a LoanFacility record (status Applied) linked to the Borrower.
text.zh: 创建与借款人关联的信贷额度记录（状态为 Applied）。

sideEffects.description: Creates Borrower and LoanFacility records in nCino.

agent.toolDescription: Capture a signed commercial loan application and create a new LoanFacility in status Applied.
promptHints: Verify the application package is signed before creating the facility.

sources.snippet: `CaptureApplication` — consumes the borrower's signed application package; produces a new `LoanFacility` record linked to the `Borrower`.

actions.name: SpreadFinancials
actions.description: Consumes the borrower's last three fiscal years of statements and produces computed ratios and an initial RiskRating candidate.
actions.descriptionZh: 读取借款人最近三个财年的报表，计算比率并生成初始风险评级候选值。

outputs.name: loan_facility
outputs.description: With computed leverage and DSCR ratios.

text.en: Read the borrower's last three fiscal years of financial statements.
text.zh: 读取借款人最近三个财年的财务报表。

text.en: Compute leverage and debt-service-coverage ratios and write them back to nCino.
text.zh: 计算杠杆与偿债保障比率并回写至 nCino。

sideEffects.description: Writes computed ratios to the LoanFacility in nCino.

agent.toolDescription: Spread three fiscal years of borrower financials and compute leverage and DSCR ratios.

sources.snippet: `SpreadFinancials` — consumes the borrower's last three fiscal years of statements; produces computed ratios written back to nCino and an initial `RiskRating`.

actions.name: AssignRiskRating
actions.description: Consumes the spread ratios and qualitative factors and produces a RiskRating with a next_review_date.
actions.descriptionZh: 依据展开比率与定性因素，生成带有下次复核日期的风险评级。

text.en: Score the spread ratios and qualitative factors with the rating model.
text.zh: 使用评级模型对展开比率与定性因素打分。

text.en: Create a RiskRating (scale 1-10) attached to the Borrower with a next_review_date.
text.zh: 创建附加于借款人的风险评级（1 至 10 级）并设定下次复核日期。

sideEffects.description: Creates a RiskRating record on the Borrower.

agent.toolDescription: Assign a 1-10 risk rating to a borrower and set the next review date.
promptHints: A rating of 9 or 10 must route to the Credit Committee (Rule R-18).

sources.snippet: `AssignRiskRating` — consumes the spread ratios and qualitative factors; produces a `RiskRating` with a `next_review_date`.

actions.name: ValueCollateral
actions.description: Consumes the appraisal report and produces Collateral fair_value and the facility LTV.
actions.descriptionZh: 读取评估报告，生成抵押物公允价值及额度的贷款价值比。

text.en: Receive the external appraiser's report.
text.zh: 接收外部评估机构的评估报告。

text.en: Create one or more Collateral records and compute fair_value and facility LTV.
text.zh: 创建一项或多项抵押物记录，并计算公允价值与额度贷款价值比。

sideEffects.description: Creates Collateral records and updates LoanFacility LTV.

agent.toolDescription: Record collateral appraisal fair value and compute the facility loan-to-value.

sources.snippet: `ValueCollateral` — consumes the appraisal report; produces `Collateral.fair_value` and the facility LTV.

actions.name: DraftCreditMemo
actions.description: Consumes the RiskRating, Collateral, and proposed structure and produces a CreditMemo with attached Covenant definitions and recommended terms.
actions.descriptionZh: 依据风险评级、抵押物与拟定结构，生成附带契约定义和建议条款的信贷审批备忘录。

text.en: Assemble the RiskRating, Collateral, and proposed structure into a credit memo.
text.zh: 将风险评级、抵押物与拟定结构整合为信贷备忘录。

text.en: Define at least one financial Covenant (e.g., DSCR >= 1.25x, max leverage <= 3.5x) bound to the LoanFacility.
text.zh: 定义至少一项绑定于信贷额度的财务契约（如 DSCR >= 1.25 倍、最大杠杆 <= 3.5 倍）。

text.en: Produce the CreditMemo with recommended terms and store it in iManage.
text.zh: 生成含建议条款的信贷备忘录并存档于 iManage。

sideEffects.description: Creates CreditMemo and Covenant records; pushes memo to iManage.

agent.toolDescription: Draft a credit memo with recommended terms and define at least one financial covenant.
promptHints: Every facility must carry at least one financial covenant before submission (Rule R-03).

sources.snippet: `DraftCreditMemo` — consumes the `RiskRating`, `Collateral`, and proposed structure; produces a `CreditMemo` with attached `Covenant` definitions and recommended terms.

actions.name: RenderCreditDecision
actions.description: Consumes the CreditMemo and produces an approval record at the correct authority level.
actions.descriptionZh: 审阅信贷备忘录，在正确的权限层级作出审批记录。

text.en: Determine the required authority level from committed amount and risk rating.
text.zh: 依据承诺金额与风险评级确定所需审批权限层级。

text.en: Render the decision; on approval set LoanFacility.status = Approved.
text.zh: 作出决定；批准时将信贷额度状态置为 Approved。

agent.toolDescription: Render an approve/decline decision on a credit memo at the correct delegated-authority level.
promptHints: Escalate above USD 5,000,000 (R-01), for ratings weaker than 6 (R-02), and block watch-listed borrowers (R-14).

sources.snippet: `RenderCreditDecision` — consumes the `CreditMemo`; produces an approval record at the correct authority level (see Rules R-01, R-02).

actions.name: BookFacility
actions.description: Consumes the approved terms from the CreditMemo and produces a booked LoanFacility (status Active) and an amortizing RepaymentSchedule.
actions.descriptionZh: 依据信贷备忘录中已批准的条款，生成已入账的信贷额度（状态 Active）及摊还还款计划。

text.en: Create the canonical LoanFacility in FLEXCUBE from approved terms.
text.zh: 依据已批准条款在 FLEXCUBE 中创建规范的信贷额度。

text.en: Generate the amortizing RepaymentSchedule and set status Active.
text.zh: 生成摊还还款计划并将状态置为 Active。

sideEffects.description: Books LoanFacility and generates RepaymentSchedule in FLEXCUBE.

agent.toolDescription: Book an approved facility into FLEXCUBE and generate its amortizing repayment schedule.

sources.snippet: `BookFacility` — consumes the approved terms from the `CreditMemo`; produces a booked `LoanFacility` (status `Active`) and an amortizing `RepaymentSchedule`.

actions.name: PerfectSecurity
actions.description: Consumes the executed security agreements and produces perfected Collateral and a satisfied conditions-precedent checklist.
actions.descriptionZh: 依据已签署的担保协议，完善抵押物担保权益并满足先决条件清单。

text.en: Record the executed security agreements in iManage and FLEXCUBE.
text.zh: 在 iManage 与 FLEXCUBE 中记录已签署的担保协议。

text.en: Set Collateral.perfection_status = Perfected and LoanFacility.conditions_met = true.
text.zh: 将抵押物完善状态置为 Perfected，并将额度的先决条件满足标志置为 true。

agent.toolDescription: Perfect pledged collateral and confirm all conditions precedent are satisfied.

sources.snippet: `PerfectSecurity` — consumes the executed security agreements; produces perfected `Collateral` and a satisfied conditions-precedent checklist.

actions.name: RequestDrawdown
actions.description: Consumes the borrower drawdown notice and produces a Drawdown record against an Active LoanFacility.
actions.descriptionZh: 受理借款人支用通知，针对生效的信贷额度生成支用记录。

text.en: Receive the borrower's drawdown notice via the Relationship Manager.
text.zh: 经客户经理接收借款人的支用通知。

text.en: Create a Drawdown (status Requested) against the Active LoanFacility.
text.zh: 针对生效的信贷额度创建支用记录（状态 Requested）。

agent.toolDescription: Create a drawdown request against an active loan facility.

sources.snippet: `RequestDrawdown` — consumes the borrower drawdown notice; produces a `Drawdown` record.

actions.name: CheckDrawdownEligibility
actions.description: Consumes the Drawdown request, live Covenant states, available undrawn commitment, and any WaiverRequest, and produces an eligibility verdict.
actions.descriptionZh: 依据支用请求、实时契约状态、可用未提取承诺及豁免申请，生成合规裁定。

text.en: Read all Covenant records and current LTV for the LoanFacility; read any active WaiverRequest.
text.zh: 读取该信贷额度的全部契约记录与当前贷款价值比，并读取任何有效的豁免申请。

text.en: Verify drawdown does not exceed undrawn commitment.
text.zh: 核验支用金额不超过未提取承诺。

text.en: Block if any financial covenant is in breach with no granted waiver on file; otherwise clear.
text.zh: 若任何财务契约违约且无已批准豁免在案则拦截，否则放行。

sideEffects.description: Sets Drawdown.status to Cleared or Blocked.

agent.toolDescription: Check a drawdown against covenant states, undrawn commitment, and waivers; return Pass or Block.
promptHints: Block when any financial covenant is breached without a granted waiver (R-05); enforce the undrawn limit (R-06).

sources.snippet: `CheckDrawdownEligibility` — consumes the `Drawdown` request, the live `Covenant` states, the available undrawn commitment, and any `WaiverRequest`; produces an eligibility verdict (`Pass`/`Block`).

actions.name: DisburseFunds
actions.description: Consumes the cleared Drawdown and produces a funds transfer and an updated outstanding balance.
actions.descriptionZh: 依据已放行的支用请求执行资金划转并更新未偿余额。

text.en: Re-validate against current covenant states if not funded within 5 business days of clearing.
text.zh: 若放行后 5 个工作日内未拨付，依据当前契约状态重新校验。

text.en: Execute the funds transfer; set Drawdown.status = Funded and increment outstanding_principal.
text.zh: 执行资金划转；将支用状态置为 Funded 并增加未偿本金。

agent.toolDescription: Disburse funds for a cleared drawdown and update the facility outstanding balance.
promptHints: Confirm funding conditions (R-04) and re-validate stale clearances over 5 business days old (R-17).

sources.snippet: `DisburseFunds` — consumes the cleared `Drawdown`; produces a funds transfer and an updated outstanding balance.

actions.name: ScheduleCovenantTest
actions.description: Consumes the covenant calendar and produces a pending covenant test per facility per quarter.
actions.descriptionZh: 依据契约日历，为每笔额度每季度生成一个待测的契约测试。

text.en: Read Covenant records with a quarterly test_frequency.
text.zh: 读取测试频率为季度的契约记录。

text.en: Schedule a pending covenant test per facility per quarter.
text.zh: 为每笔额度每季度排定一个待测的契约测试。

sideEffects.description: Schedules covenant tests at start of each reporting period.

agent.toolDescription: Schedule quarterly covenant tests per facility from the covenant calendar.

sources.snippet: `ScheduleCovenantTest` — consumes the covenant calendar; produces a pending covenant test per facility per quarter.

actions.name: EvaluateCovenant
actions.description: Consumes the latest financials and the Covenant thresholds and produces a Covenant test_result.
actions.descriptionZh: 依据最新财务数据与契约阈值，生成契约测试结果。

text.en: Read the borrower's quarterly financials and recompute DSCR, leverage, and LTV.
text.zh: 读取借款人季度财务数据并重算偿债保障比率、杠杆与贷款价值比。

text.en: Compare against thresholds; set test_result Compliant or Breached.
text.zh: 与阈值比较；将测试结果置为 Compliant 或 Breached。

agent.toolDescription: Evaluate a covenant against the latest financials and mark it Compliant or Breached.
promptHints: DSCR breaches below 1.25x (R-11); leverage breaches above 3.5x (R-12).

sources.snippet: `EvaluateCovenant` — consumes the latest financials and the `Covenant` thresholds; produces a `Covenant.test_result` (`Compliant` / `Breached`).

actions.name: EscalateBreach
actions.description: Consumes the CovenantBreached event and produces a committee notification citing the exact covenant clause and loan-agreement section.
actions.descriptionZh: 依据契约违约事件，生成引用具体契约条款与贷款协议章节的委员会通知。

text.en: Create a breach record on the Covenant.
text.zh: 在契约上创建违约记录。

text.en: Notify the Credit Committee within 2 business days citing the clause and loan-agreement section.
text.zh: 在 2 个工作日内通知信贷委员会，并引用条款与贷款协议章节。

sideEffects.description: Notifies the Credit Committee of the breach.

agent.toolDescription: Escalate a covenant breach to the Credit Committee with a clause citation within 2 business days.
promptHints: Always cite the breached covenant clause and the relevant loan-agreement section (R-13).

sources.snippet: `EscalateBreach` — consumes the `CovenantBreached` event; produces a committee notification citing the exact covenant clause and loan-agreement section.

actions.name: DecideWaiver
actions.description: Consumes the WaiverRequest and produces a Granted or Denied decision recorded against the facility.
actions.descriptionZh: 审阅豁免申请，作出批准或拒绝的决定并记录于额度。

text.en: Confirm the request is decided by the Credit Committee with a valid expiry date.
text.zh: 确认申请由信贷委员会决定且具有合法到期日。

text.en: Refuse retroactive waivers for breaches that already triggered a margin call.
text.zh: 拒绝对已触发追加保证金的违约进行追溯豁免。

text.en: Record a Granted or Denied decision; on grant, link the waiver to the breached Covenant.
text.zh: 记录批准或拒绝决定；批准时将豁免关联至违约契约。

sideEffects.description: Sets WaiverRequest.status and links to the Covenant on grant.

agent.toolDescription: Decide a covenant-breach waiver request, granting only with a valid expiry and never retroactively after a margin call.
promptHints: Only the Credit Committee may grant (R-15); never grant retroactively after a margin call (R-20).

sources.snippet: `DecideWaiver` — consumes the `WaiverRequest`; produces a `Granted` or `Denied` decision recorded against the facility.

actions.name: IssueMarginCall
actions.description: Consumes the LTV breach result and produces a MarginCallNotice with a cure deadline.
actions.descriptionZh: 依据贷款价值比违约结果，生成带有补足期限的追加保证金通知。

text.en: Confirm the LTV-specific covenant breach.
text.zh: 确认贷款价值比专项契约违约。

text.en: Create a MarginCallNotice with a 10-business-day cure deadline linked to the facility and collateral.
text.zh: 创建关联额度与抵押物、补足期限为 10 个工作日的追加保证金通知。

sideEffects.description: Creates a MarginCallNotice in FLEXCUBE and iManage.

agent.toolDescription: Issue a margin call notice on an LTV breach with a 10-business-day cure deadline.
promptHints: Triggered by an LTV breach over 80% (R-09); set a 10-business-day cure deadline (R-16).

sources.snippet: `IssueMarginCall` — consumes the LTV breach result; produces a `MarginCallNotice` with a cure deadline.

actions.name: TriggerRatingReview
actions.description: Consumes the rating calendar and breach events and produces a pending review task for the Credit Analyst.
actions.descriptionZh: 依据评级日历与违约事件，为信贷分析师生成待办复核任务。

text.en: Read RiskRating.next_review_date and recent CovenantBreached events.
text.zh: 读取风险评级的下次复核日期与近期契约违约事件。

text.en: Raise a review due at least every 12 months, or within 30 days of any breach, whichever is sooner.
text.zh: 在至少每 12 个月、或任何违约后 30 日内（以较早者为准）生成复核到期。

agent.toolDescription: Raise a risk-rating review when due by calendar or by a recent covenant breach.
promptHints: Due at least every 12 months (R-07) or within 30 days of a breach (R-08), whichever is sooner.

sources.snippet: `TriggerRatingReview` — consumes the rating calendar and breach events; produces a pending review task for the Credit Analyst.

actions.name: RefreshRiskRating
actions.description: Consumes the latest financials and breach history and produces an updated RiskRating (new version).
actions.descriptionZh: 依据最新财务数据与违约历史，生成更新版本的风险评级。

text.en: Re-spread the latest financials and review breach history.
text.zh: 重新展开最新财务数据并审阅违约历史。

text.en: Update RiskRating.value and next_review_date on the Borrower and increment version.
text.zh: 更新借款人风险评级的数值与下次复核日期并递增版本号。

sideEffects.description: Updates RiskRating value/version on the Borrower.

agent.toolDescription: Refresh a borrower's risk rating from the latest financials and breach history.
promptHints: A refreshed rating of 9 or 10 must route to the Credit Committee (R-18).

sources.snippet: `RefreshRiskRating` — consumes the latest financials and breach history; produces an updated `RiskRating`.

events.name: application.submitted
events.description: A borrower has submitted a signed loan application package via the borrower portal to nCino.
events.descriptionZh: 借款人已通过借款人门户向 nCino 提交已签署的贷款申请材料。

sources.snippet: `ApplicationSubmitted` | Borrower portal → nCino | nCino | `Borrower` application | `CaptureApplication`

events.name: facility.created
events.description: A new LoanFacility record was created in nCino and is ready for financial spreading.
events.descriptionZh: 在 nCino 中创建了新的信贷额度记录，准备进行财务报表展开。

sources.snippet: `FacilityCreated` | nCino | Sageworks | `LoanFacility` | `SpreadFinancials`

events.name: financials.spread
events.description: Borrower financials were spread by Sageworks and computed ratios returned to nCino.
events.descriptionZh: Sageworks 已完成借款人财务报表展开并将计算比率返回 nCino。

sources.snippet: `FinancialsSpread` | Sageworks | nCino | spread ratios | `AssignRiskRating`

events.name: risk-rating.assigned
events.description: A RiskRating was assigned (or refreshed to a new version) for a Borrower.
events.descriptionZh: 已为借款人授予（或刷新为新版本的）风险评级。

sources.snippet: `RiskRatingAssigned` | nCino | nCino, CovenantWatch | `RiskRating` | `DraftCreditMemo`

events.name: collateral.valued
events.description: Collateral fair value and the facility LTV were computed from an appraisal report.
events.descriptionZh: 已依据评估报告计算抵押物公允价值与额度贷款价值比。

sources.snippet: `CollateralValued` | nCino | FLEXCUBE | `Collateral` | `ValueCollateral`

events.name: credit-memo.submitted
events.description: A CreditMemo was submitted into the nCino approval workflow for a credit decision.
events.descriptionZh: 信贷备忘录已提交至 nCino 审批流程以作出信贷决定。

sources.snippet: `CreditMemoSubmitted` | nCino | nCino (approval) | `CreditMemo` | `RenderCreditDecision`

events.name: facility.approved
events.description: A credit decision approved the facility at the correct authority level; mirrored into FLEXCUBE.
events.descriptionZh: 信贷决定在正确权限层级批准了额度，并镜像至 FLEXCUBE。

sources.snippet: `FacilityApproved` | nCino | Oracle FLEXCUBE | `LoanFacility`, `CreditMemo` | `BookFacility`

events.name: facility.declined
events.description: A credit decision declined the facility; the pipeline is closed.
events.descriptionZh: 信贷决定否决了额度，流程关闭。

sources.snippet: `FacilityDeclined` | nCino | nCino | `CreditMemo` | —

events.name: facility.booked
events.description: The canonical LoanFacility and its RepaymentSchedule were booked in FLEXCUBE.
events.descriptionZh: 规范的信贷额度及其还款计划已在 FLEXCUBE 入账。

sources.snippet: `FacilityBooked` | Oracle FLEXCUBE | CovenantWatch, Loan Ops | `LoanFacility`, `RepaymentSchedule` | `PerfectSecurity`

events.name: security.perfected
events.description: Security agreements were executed and collateral perfected; together with FacilityBooked this is the precondition for funding (Rule R-04).
events.descriptionZh: 已签署担保协议并完善抵押物担保权益；与额度入账共同构成放款先决条件（规则 R-04）。

sources.snippet: `SecurityPerfected` | Loan Ops → FLEXCUBE | FLEXCUBE | `Collateral` | (enables funding, Rule R-04)

events.name: drawdown.requested
events.description: A Drawdown was requested against an Active LoanFacility and routed to CovenantWatch for eligibility checking.
events.descriptionZh: 针对生效信贷额度发起了支用请求，并路由至 CovenantWatch 进行合规检查。

sources.snippet: `DrawdownRequested` | nCino | CovenantWatch | `Drawdown` | `CheckDrawdownEligibility`

events.name: drawdown.cleared
events.description: A Drawdown passed the pre-disbursement covenant and limit check and may be disbursed.
events.descriptionZh: 支用通过了拨付前契约与限额检查，可予拨付。

sources.snippet: `DrawdownCleared` | CovenantWatch | Oracle FLEXCUBE | `Drawdown` | `DisburseFunds`

events.name: drawdown.blocked
events.description: A Drawdown was blocked because a financial covenant is in breach with no waiver on file (Rule R-05).
events.descriptionZh: 因财务契约违约且无豁免在案，支用被拦截（规则 R-05）。

sources.snippet: `DrawdownBlocked` | CovenantWatch | nCino, Loan Ops | `Drawdown` | (Rule R-05)

events.name: funds.disbursed
events.description: Funds were disbursed for a cleared Drawdown and the facility outstanding balance updated.
events.descriptionZh: 已为放行的支用拨付资金并更新额度未偿余额。

sources.snippet: `FundsDisbursed` | Oracle FLEXCUBE | nCino, GL | `Drawdown`, `LoanFacility` | —

events.name: covenant.test-due
events.description: A covenant test is due at the start of a reporting period and routed to Sageworks and the analyst.
events.descriptionZh: 在报告期开始时契约测试到期，路由至 Sageworks 与分析师。

sources.snippet: `CovenantTestDue` | CovenantWatch | Sageworks, Analyst | `Covenant` | `EvaluateCovenant`

events.name: covenant.tested
events.description: A covenant was tested and its test_result recorded (Compliant or Breached).
events.descriptionZh: 契约已完成测试并记录测试结果（合规或违约）。

sources.snippet: `CovenantTested` | CovenantWatch | nCino | `Covenant` | —

events.name: covenant.breached
events.description: A covenant test failed; the breach is routed to nCino and the Credit Committee, drives escalation, margin calls, and out-of-cycle rating review.
events.descriptionZh: 契约测试未通过；违约路由至 nCino 与信贷委员会，驱动上报、追加保证金及周期外评级复核。

sources.snippet: `CovenantBreached` | CovenantWatch | nCino, Credit Committee | `Covenant` | `EscalateBreach`, `IssueMarginCall`

events.name: breach.escalated
events.description: A breach was escalated to the Credit Committee, optionally with a WaiverRequest, for a waiver decision.
events.descriptionZh: 违约已上报信贷委员会（可附豁免申请），以作出豁免决定。

sources.snippet: `BreachEscalated` | CovenantWatch | Credit Committee | `Covenant`, `WaiverRequest` | `DecideWaiver`

events.name: waiver.granted
events.description: A WaiverRequest was granted, re-enabling drawdowns previously blocked under Rule R-05.
events.descriptionZh: 豁免申请已获批准，重新启用此前因规则 R-05 被拦截的支用。

sources.snippet: `WaiverGranted` | nCino | CovenantWatch, FLEXCUBE | `WaiverRequest` | (re-enables drawdown)

events.name: waiver.denied
events.description: A WaiverRequest was denied; the breached covenant remains in effect.
events.descriptionZh: 豁免申请被拒绝；违约契约仍然有效。

sources.snippet: `WaiverDenied` | nCino | nCino | `WaiverRequest` | —

events.name: margin-call.issued
events.description: A MarginCallNotice was issued on an LTV breach with a cure deadline, notifying the borrower portal and iManage.
events.descriptionZh: 因贷款价值比违约发出了带补足期限的追加保证金通知，通知借款人门户与 iManage。

sources.snippet: `MarginCallIssued` | Oracle FLEXCUBE | Borrower portal, iManage | `MarginCallNotice` | (Rule R-16)

events.name: rating.review-due
events.description: A risk-rating review is due by calendar or by a recent covenant breach, routed to the analyst.
events.descriptionZh: 按日历或近期契约违约，风险评级复核到期，路由至分析师。

sources.snippet: `RatingReviewDue` | nCino | Analyst | `RiskRating` | `RefreshRiskRating`

processes.description: P1: From application capture through spreading, rating, collateral valuation, credit memo, decision, booking, and security perfection that together enable funding.

triggers.description: A borrower submits a signed application package.

sources.snippet: **P1 — Origination to Funding** (受理到放款): §3

processes.description: P2: From a borrower drawdown request through the pre-disbursement covenant and limit check to fund disbursement on a cleared drawdown.

triggers.description: A borrower requests a drawdown against an active facility.

sources.snippet: **P2 — Drawdown Servicing** (放款支用): §4

processes.description: P3: Quarterly scheduling and evaluation of covenants, with branches to breach escalation/waiver decisions and LTV margin calls.

triggers.description: Start of each fiscal quarter; CovenantWatch scheduler raises tests within 45 days of quarter end (Rule R-10).

sources.snippet: **P3 — Quarterly Covenant Monitoring** (季度契约监测): §5

processes.description: P4: Calendar- or breach-triggered review and re-assignment of a borrower's risk rating.

triggers.description: Within 30 days of any covenant breach (Rule R-08).

sources.snippet: **P4 — Risk Rating Review** (风险评级复核): §6

stageCritiques.objects: All 10 objects from the §5 catalogue extracted with PK/FK key roles and closed-vocab enums grounded in 03-systems-and-data.md §2.
stageCritiques.rules: All 20 atomic rules R-01..R-20 mined sentence-by-sentence with verbatim snippets, formal strings, and CEL where expressible; clustered into 8 groups.
stageCritiques.actions: All 18 SOP actions typed with IO referencing object ids, guard rules, preconditions, and agent tool bindings (snake_case tools).
stageCritiques.events: All 22 inter-system events from §4 captured; producedBy/consumedBy are exact inverses of action emitsEvents/triggeredByEventIds.
stageCritiques.processes: Four documented processes P1-P4 chained as event-driven/state-machine workflows with branch conditions for LTV vs financial breaches.
